knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Cranking system: composite cranking rods for casting distance and lure response. Wide-spool reel for more line/better casting. Low 5.3:1 gear ratio for power to horse fish from cover — handles everything from Series 3 to 10XD. Fluorocarbon 10-17lb for sinking and abrasion resistance. Always upgrade crankbait hooks to heavier gauge short shank trebles — stock hooks often lack stiffness and foul on each other.'
